title: Move Zeroes
pattern: Array â€” Two Pointer In-place Compaction
coreIdea: Move all zeroes in an array to the end while maintaining the relative order of non-zero elements, in-place, using a pointer that tracks the position to place the next non-zero element found.
recognitionCues: asks to move a specific value to the end in-place
relative order of other elements must be preserved
approach: Maintain a pointer 'insertPos' starting at 0. Traverse the array; whenever a non-zero element is found, swap it with the element at insertPos, and increment insertPos. This naturally pushes zeroes toward the end while preserving order.
